title: Arcane Destiny
description: A Medieval Modpack with Focus on Exploration, Magic and Combat!
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/449e96faba702e85ae913a2f4ce5ca5df37be42e.png)
**Arcane Destiny** is a Medieval themed modpack about exploration, Magic and Combat, With lots of new mobs,Bosses,Structures,Biomes,dungeons,Features and more!

**Notice!**
This is my First Modpack i`ve ever Made. Expect Bugs!

Due to some copyright and Modrinth issues following mods arent in the Modrinth Version of the modpack. Please download them from the links below and drop them into the mods folder.
- https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture/download/6296111
- https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dungeons-and-combat/download/6377690
- https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/medieval-music/download/4612835
  


![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5c31ff1438f7290ab57cfcfcf9f71a76e5bf158_0.webp)





20+ High Quality Bosses

300+ Mods

300+ mobs

350+ new Structures

70+ new Biomes

3 new Dimensions

Overhauled End

Overhauled Nether

Overhauled Vanilla features

Quests (coming soon)

Better Combat system

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9cf507949a2298948b87fffe8194b427549a6fb_0.webp)
(https://discord.gg/EQu7MqPzdu)

Support:

If you like the modpack and want to give me something back, I would be very happy! I'm still underage, so I can't accept donations - but you're welcome to give me something from my Steam wishlist.

https://store.steampowered.com/wishlist/profiles/76561199679909713/

Of course, this is completely voluntary - the biggest support is when you play and share the modpack!
